projects.title: Luggin
projects.subtitle: Luggin is a solution that fosters the unused capacity of air travellers into a decentralised global network. It aims to be the first secure global air crowdshipping network. Every day, millions of travelers carry unused baggage while international shipping costs skyrocket, air transport regulations become increasingly stringent, small parcel taxes tighten, fuel prices soar, and air travel becomes more and more polluting. Luggin connects travelers with available baggage space with shippers seeking faster and cheaper delivery, or with passengers on the same flight who have excess baggage. The result for users is revenue for travellers, reduced costs for shippers or passengers with excess baggage, and an optimised carbon footprint.

projects.title: Gride: Safe Ride, Fast Delivery, Fair Prices. No Compromise
projects.subtitle: Gride was created to address gaps in transportation, food access, Delivery, and essential services in underserved communities. Our mission is building a more inclusive future of urban mobility one that is equitable, affordable, and designed with community values at its core. Our goal is to provide fair, inclusive, and affordable solutions, empowering local economies and improving quality of life. By combining ride-hailing, food delivery, and grocery shopping, Gride aims to bridge service gaps and foster community development.

projects.title: Giro Ride App
projects.subtitle:
Giro — The Powered Ride-Hailing App 

Giro is an AI-powered ride-hailing app that gets you where you’re going faster, smarter, and safer.                    
It uses real-time intelligence to match you with the best driver, optimize routes, and personalize every ride to your preferences.                                                                                                                                               Smooth booking, professional navigation, reliable trips, and better prices for drivers.                                            
Giro thinks ahead so you don’t have to.
And we need your support to launch it.

projects.title: The Mapp Tray
projects.subtitle: The Mapp Tray is a toddler car seat with an attached tray that is removable. The tray when attached, has the ability to move up to allow the child to enter the toddler car seat. After being placed in the toddler car seat, the child has the ability to pull the tray down in front of the child to enjoy snacks, meals, drinks and even enjoy playing with toys or using an iPad or Tablet to enjoy movies. This type of car seat keeps the child occupied while allowing little or no interaction from the driver or person in the front passenger seat so there can be total concentration on driving to the desired destination.
